prompt: nul-cam-motion-1x1-02-retry: Square 1:1 editorial wellness lifestyle photograph. Recreate the scene, subject, pose, clothing, setting, lighting, and color palette of the provided reference image faithfully — same person, same activity, same environment. Add CAMERA-IN-MOTION blur: subtle directional motion blur permeates the entire frame as if captured during a slow-shutter pan from a moving camera, distributed evenly across foreground and background, with soft secondary exposures on actively moving limbs. Subject is the relative anchor (most legible) but still softer than tack-sharp. Slight Dutch tilt ~5-8°. Documentary photojournalism look, painterly low-key lighting, fine 35mm grain, subtle halation. No text, no logos.
